description: Operation Span Task - measures working memory capacity by combining math problem solving with letter recall

parameters.name: feedbacktimeout
parameters.description: Duration in milliseconds to display feedback after each trial

parameters.name: distractfile
parameters.description: CSV file containing math problems (format: problem,answer,correctness)

parameters.name: batterythreshold
parameters.description: Minimum accuracy (0.0-1.0) required on math problems to proceed to main test. Typically 0.85 (85%)

parameters.name: batteryFeedback
parameters.description: Whether to show feedback during test battery (1=yes, 0=no)

parameters.name: distracttimeoutminimum
parameters.description: Minimum timeout in milliseconds for math problems during test battery

parameters.name: distracttimeoutmultiplier
parameters.description: Multiplier for standard deviation when calculating math timeout: timeout = mean + (multiplier × SD). Unsworth et al. (2005) used mean + 2.5*SD based on extensive piloting

parameters.name: requirethresholdprebattery
parameters.description: Require meeting accuracy threshold before starting test battery (1=yes, 0=no)

parameters.name: allowsecondchance
parameters.description: Allow a second practice attempt if first practice fails to meet threshold (1=yes, 0=no)

parameters.name: responsemode
parameters.description: Response collection mode (currently only 'none' is supported, using custom mouse grid)

parameters.name: testreps
parameters.description: Number of repetitions for each set size in the test battery (e.g., 3 means each set size appears 3 times)

parameters.name: testminsize
parameters.description: Minimum set size (number of letters to recall) in the test battery. Must be at least 2

parameters.name: testmaxsize
parameters.description: Maximum set size (number of letters to recall) in the test battery. Cannot exceed 12 (the memory grid size: 3 columns × 4 rows)
